Home / Service Areas / Overland Park

Fence company in Overland Park, MO

Trusted local professionals serving Overland Park and surrounding communities

Serving Overland Park, MO

Kansas City Fence Company is proud to offer our comprehensive fencing services to the residents and businesses of Overland Park, Missouri. We understand the unique needs of this thriving community, known for its established suburban neighborhoods developed primarily between the 1970s and 1990s. Whether you're looking to enhance your property's curb appeal, increase security, or create a safe and private outdoor space for your family, we have the perfect fencing solution for you. Our experienced team is well-versed in installing and repairing a wide variety of fence styles, from classic wood picket fences to durable vinyl and ornamental iron options. We also understand the challenges posed by Overland Park's climate, including cold winters and occasional ice storms, and we can recommend materials and construction techniques that will ensure your fence stands the test of time. We are committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and customer service, ensuring your complete satisfaction with every project.

Overland Park is a large suburban city known for its excellent schools, family-friendly atmosphere, and well-maintained neighborhoods, many built between the 1970s and 1990s. The city experiences cold winters with occasional ice storms.

Wood Fence Installation

Classic wood fences tailored to your Kansas City property.

Gate Installation & Repair

Secure and stylish gates for your fence, expertly installed and repaired.

Commercial Fencing Solutions

Secure your business with our durable and reliable commercial fencing options.
